name: Kagebooshi
description: History Before Exalt Version 5.6.0.0 (Jan 2025), this item dealt 450-650 damage and didn’t scale with WIS. It had a projectile speed of 15 tiles/second, a lifetime of 0.8 seconds and an MP cost of 100.
effects: Hitbox Size: 1.4 Shots hit multiple targets Shots boomerang Shots pass through obstacles
